```typescript
// Stock adjustment router — tenant-scoped inventory corrections with atomic updates

import { z } from 'zod';
import { TRPCError } from '@trpc/server';
import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc.js';
import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac.js';
import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';

export const stockAdjustmentRouter = createTRPCRouter({
  list: tenantProcedure
    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN))
    .input(
      z.object({
        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          const where = { tenantId };
          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
            prisma.stockAdjustment.findMany({
              where,
              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
              take: input.limit,
              orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
              include: {
                createdByUser: { select: { name: true } },
                approvedByUser: { select: { name: true } },
                items: { include: { product: { select: { name: true } } } },
              },
            }),
            prisma.stockAdjustment.count({ where }),
          ]);
          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
        },
      );
    }),

  create: tenantProcedure
    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN))
    .input(
      z.object({
        adjustmentDate: z.string().datetime(),
        reason: z.enum(['recount', 'damage', 'theft', 'correction', 'other']),
        notes: z.string().max(2000).nullable().default(null),
        items: z.array(
          z.object({
            productId: z.string().cuid(),
            quantityDelta: z.number().int(),
          }).strict(),
        ).min(1),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          return prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
            // Validate all products exist and stock won't go negative
            for (const item of input.items) {
              const product = await tx.product.findFirstOrThrow({
                where: { id: item.productId, tenantId },
              });
              if (product.currentQuantity + item.quantityDelta < 0) {
                throw new TRPCError({
                  code: 'BAD_REQUEST',
                  message: `Adjustment would result in negative stock for ${product.name}.`,
                });
              }
            }

            const adjustment = await tx.stockAdjustment.create({
              data: {
                tenantId,
                adjustmentDate: new Date(input.adjustmentDate),
                reason: input.reason,
                notes: input.notes,
                createdByUserId: ctx.userId,
                items: { create: input.items.map((item) => ({ ...item, tenantId })) },
              },
            });

            // Fetch items separately — $extends client loses include types in transactions
            const adjustmentItems = await tx.stockAdjustmentItem.findMany({
              where: { stockAdjustmentId: adjustment.id },
            });

            // Apply quantity changes and create movement logs
            for (const item of adjustmentItems) {
              const product = await tx.product.findFirstOrThrow({
                where: { id: item.productId, tenantId },
              });

              if (item.quantityDelta > 0) {
                await tx.product.update({
                  where: { id: item.productId },
                  data: { currentQuantity: { increment: item.quantityDelta } },
                });
              } else {
                await tx.product.update({
                  where: { id: item.productId },
                  data: { currentQuantity: { decrement: Math.abs(item.quantityDelta) } },
                });
              }

              await tx.stockMovementLog.create({
                data: {
                  tenantId,
                  productId: item.productId,
                  movementType: 'adjustment',
                  referenceType: 'StockAdjustment',
                  referenceId: adjustment.id,
                  quantityBefore: product.currentQuantity,
                  quantityDelta: item.quantityDelta,
                  quantityAfter: product.currentQuantity + item.quantityDelta,
                  performedByUserId: ctx.userId,
                  notes: `${input.reason}: ${input.notes ?? 'No notes'}`,
                  performedAt: new Date(),
                },
              });
            }

            return adjustment;
          });
        },
      );
    }),
});
```

```typescript
// Stock in router — tenant-scoped receiving with atomic quantity updates

import { z } from 'zod';
import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc.js';
import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac.js';
import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';

export const stockInRouter = createTRPCRouter({
  list: tenantProcedure
    .input(
      z.object({
        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          const where = { tenantId };
          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
            prisma.stockIn.findMany({
              where,
              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
              take: input.limit,
              orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
              include: { items: { include: { product: { select: { name: true } } } } },
            }),
            prisma.stockIn.count({ where }),
          ]);
          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
        },
      );
    }),

  create: tenantProcedure
    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.WAREHOUSE_STAFF, UserRole.PURCHASING_STAFF))
    .input(
      z.object({
        purchaseOrderId: z.string().cuid().nullable().default(null),
        receivedDate: z.string().datetime(),
        notes: z.string().max(2000).nullable().default(null),
        items: z.array(
          z.object({
            productId: z.string().cuid(),
            quantity: z.number().int().min(1),
            supplierCostSnapshot: z.number().min(0),
          }).strict(),
        ).min(1),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          // Atomic transaction — stock in + quantity update + movement log
          return prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
            const stockIn = await tx.stockIn.create({
              data: {
                tenantId,
                referenceNumber: `SI-${Date.now()}`,
                purchaseOrderId: input.purchaseOrderId,
                receivedDate: new Date(input.receivedDate),
                receivedByUserId: ctx.userId,
                notes: input.notes,
                items: { create: input.items.map((item) => ({ ...item, tenantId })) },
              },
            });

            // Fetch items separately — $extends client loses include types in transactions
            const stockInItems = await tx.stockInItem.findMany({
              where: { stockInId: stockIn.id },
            });

            // Update product quantities and create movement logs
            for (const item of stockInItems) {
              const product = await tx.product.findFirstOrThrow({
                where: { id: item.productId, tenantId },
              });

              await tx.product.update({
                where: { id: item.productId },
                data: { currentQuantity: { increment: item.quantity } },
              });

              await tx.stockMovementLog.create({
                data: {
                  tenantId,
                  productId: item.productId,
                  movementType: 'stock_in',
                  referenceType: 'StockIn',
                  referenceId: stockIn.id,
                  quantityBefore: product.currentQuantity,
                  quantityDelta: item.quantity,
                  quantityAfter: product.currentQuantity + item.quantity,
                  performedByUserId: ctx.userId,
                  performedAt: new Date(),
                },
              });
            }

            return stockIn;
          });
        },
      );
    }),
});
```

```typescript
// Stock out router — tenant-scoped releasing with atomic quantity updates

import { z } from 'zod';
import { TRPCError } from '@trpc/server';
import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc.js';
import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac.js';
import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';

export const stockOutRouter = createTRPCRouter({
  list: tenantProcedure
    .input(
      z.object({
        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          const where = { tenantId };
          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
            prisma.stockOut.findMany({
              where,
              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
              take: input.limit,
              orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
              include: { items: { include: { product: { select: { name: true } } } } },
            }),
            prisma.stockOut.count({ where }),
          ]);
          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
        },
      );
    }),

  create: tenantProcedure
    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.WAREHOUSE_STAFF))
    .input(
      z.object({
        releasedDate: z.string().datetime(),
        requestedByName: z.string().min(1).max(200),
        usedFor: z.string().min(1).max(500),
        notes: z.string().max(2000).nullable().default(null),
        items: z.array(
          z.object({
            productId: z.string().cuid(),
            quantity: z.number().int().min(1),
            sellingPriceSnapshot: z.number().min(0),
          }).strict(),
        ).min(1),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          return prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
            // Generate slip number (SO-00001 format, per-tenant sequential)
            const lastOut = await tx.stockOut.findFirst({
              where: { tenantId },
              orderBy: { printableSlipNumber: 'desc' },
              select: { printableSlipNumber: true },
            });
            const lastNum = lastOut !== null
              ? parseInt(lastOut.printableSlipNumber.replace('SO-', ''), 10)
              : 0;
            const slipNumber = `SO-${String(lastNum + 1).padStart(5, '0')}`;

            // Validate sufficient stock for all items
            for (const item of input.items) {
              const product = await tx.product.findFirstOrThrow({
                where: { id: item.productId, tenantId },
              });
              if (product.currentQuantity < item.quantity) {
                throw new TRPCError({
                  code: 'BAD_REQUEST',
                  message: `Insufficient stock for ${product.name}. Available: ${product.currentQuantity}`,
                });
              }
            }

            const stockOut = await tx.stockOut.create({
              data: {
                tenantId,
                referenceNumber: `SO-REF-${Date.now()}`,
                releasedDate: new Date(input.releasedDate),
                releasedByUserId: ctx.userId,
                requestedByName: input.requestedByName,
                usedFor: input.usedFor,
                notes: input.notes,
                printableSlipNumber: slipNumber,
                items: { create: input.items.map((item) => ({ ...item, tenantId })) },
              },
            });

            // Fetch items separately — $extends client loses include types in transactions
            const stockOutItems = await tx.stockOutItem.findMany({
              where: { stockOutId: stockOut.id },
            });

            // Decrement quantities and create movement logs
            for (const item of stockOutItems) {
              const product = await tx.product.findFirstOrThrow({
                where: { id: item.productId, tenantId },
              });

              await tx.product.update({
                where: { id: item.productId },
                data: { currentQuantity: { decrement: item.quantity } },
              });

              await tx.stockMovementLog.create({
                data: {
                  tenantId,
                  productId: item.productId,
                  movementType: 'stock_out',
                  referenceType: 'StockOut',
                  referenceId: stockOut.id,
                  quantityBefore: product.currentQuantity,
                  quantityDelta: -item.quantity,
                  quantityAfter: product.currentQuantity - item.quantity,
                  performedByUserId: ctx.userId,
                  requestedByName: input.requestedByName,
                  usedFor: input.usedFor,
                  performedAt: new Date(),
                },
              });
            }

            return stockOut;
          });
        },
      );
    }),
});
```

```typescript
// Supplier router — tenant-scoped CRUD

import { z } from 'zod';
import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc.js';
import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac.js';
import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';
import type { Prisma } from '@inventorize/db';

export const supplierRouter = createTRPCRouter({
  list: tenantProcedure
    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.PURCHASING_STAFF))
    .input(
      z.object({
        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
        search: z.string().optional(),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          const where = {
            tenantId,
            ...(input.search !== undefined
              ? {
                  OR: [
                    { name: { contains: input.search, mode: 'insensitive' as const } },
                    { contactPerson: { contains: input.search, mode: 'insensitive' as const } },
                  ],
                }
              : {}),
          };
          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
            prisma.supplier.findMany({
              where,
              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
              take: input.limit,
              orderBy: { name: 'asc' },
            }),
            prisma.supplier.count({ where }),
          ]);
          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
        },
      );
    }),

  create: tenantProcedure
    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.PURCHASING_STAFF))
    .input(
      z.object({
        name: z.string().min(1).max(200),
        contactPerson: z.string().max(200).nullable().default(null),
        phone: z.string().max(50).nullable().default(null),
        email: z.string().email().nullable().default(null),
        address: z.string().max(500).nullable().default(null),
        notes: z.string().max(2000).nullable().default(null),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          return prisma.supplier.create({
            data: { ...input, tenantId, isActive: true },
          });
        },
      );
    }),

  update: tenantProcedure
    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.PURCHASING_STAFF))
    .input(
      z.object({
        id: z.string().cuid(),
        name: z.string().min(1).max(200).optional(),
        contactPerson: z.string().max(200).nullable().optional(),
        phone: z.string().max(50).nullable().optional(),
        email: z.string().email().nullable().optional(),
        address: z.string().max(500).nullable().optional(),
        notes: z.string().max(2000).nullable().optional(),
        isActive: z.boolean().optional(),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          const { id, ...data } = input;
          const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
          if (data.name !== undefined) updateData['name'] = data.name;
          if (data.contactPerson !== undefined) updateData['contactPerson'] = data.contactPerson;
          if (data.phone !== undefined) updateData['phone'] = data.phone;
          if (data.email !== undefined) updateData['email'] = data.email;
          if (data.address !== undefined) updateData['address'] = data.address;
          if (data.notes !== undefined) updateData['notes'] = data.notes;
          if (data.isActive !== undefined) updateData['isActive'] = data.isActive;
          return prisma.supplier.update({
            where: { id },
            data: updateData as Prisma.SupplierUncheckedUpdateInput,
          });
        },
      );
    }),
});

```

```typescript
// User router — tenant-scoped user management (admin only)

import { z } from 'zod';
import { TRPCError } from '@trpc/server';
import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc.js';
import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac.js';
import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';
import type { Prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';

export const userRouter = createTRPCRouter({
  list: tenantProcedure
    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN))
    .input(
      z.object({
        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
        search: z.string().optional(),
        isActive: z.boolean().optional(),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          const where = {
            tenantId,
            ...(input.search !== undefined
              ? {
                  OR: [
                    { name: { contains: input.search, mode: 'insensitive' as const } },
                    { email: { contains: input.search, mode: 'insensitive' as const } },
                  ],
                }
              : {}),
            ...(input.isActive !== undefined ? { isActive: input.isActive } : {}),
          };
          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
            prisma.user.findMany({
              where,
              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
              take: input.limit,
              orderBy: { name: 'asc' },
              select: {
                id: true,
                name: true,
                email: true,
                role: true,
                isActive: true,
                lastLoginAt: true,
                createdAt: true,
              },
            }),
            prisma.user.count({ where }),
          ]);
          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
        },
      );
    }),

  create: tenantProcedure
    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN))
    .input(
      z.object({
        name: z.string().min(1).max(200),
        email: z.string().email(),
        password: z.string().min(8).max(128),
        role: z.enum(['admin', 'warehouse_staff', 'purchasing_staff']),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          // Check for duplicate email within tenant
          const existing = await prisma.user.findFirst({
            where: { email: input.email, tenantId },
          });
          if (existing !== null) {
            throw new TRPCError({
              code: 'CONFLICT',
              message: 'A user with this email already exists.',
            });
          }

          const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(input.password, 12);
          return prisma.user.create({
            data: {
              tenantId,
              name: input.name,
              email: input.email,
              hashedPassword,
              role: input.role,
              isActive: true,
            },
            select: {
              id: true,
              name: true,
              email: true,
              role: true,
              isActive: true,
              createdAt: true,
            },
          });
        },
      );
    }),

  update: tenantProcedure
    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN))
    .input(
      z.object({
        id: z.string().cuid(),
        name: z.string().min(1).max(200).optional(),
        email: z.string().email().optional(),
        role: z.enum(['admin', 'warehouse_staff', 'purchasing_staff']).optional(),
        isActive: z.boolean().optional(),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          // Verify user belongs to this tenant
          const user = await prisma.user.findFirst({
            where: { id: input.id, tenantId },
          });
          if (user === null) {
            throw new TRPCError({ code: 'NOT_FOUND', message: 'Resource not found.' });
          }

          // Prevent self-deactivation
          if (input.id === ctx.userId && input.isActive === false) {
            throw new TRPCError({
              code: 'BAD_REQUEST',
              message: 'You cannot deactivate your own account.',
            });
          }

          const { id, ...data } = input;
          const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {};
          if (data.name !== undefined) updateData['name'] = data.name;
          if (data.email !== undefined) updateData['email'] = data.email;
          if (data.role !== undefined) updateData['role'] = data.role;
          if (data.isActive !== undefined) updateData['isActive'] = data.isActive;
          return prisma.user.update({
            where: { id },
            data: updateData as Prisma.UserUncheckedUpdateInput,
            select: {
              id: true,
              name: true,
              email: true,
              role: true,
              isActive: true,
              createdAt: true,
            },
          });
        },
      );
    }),

  resetPassword: tenantProcedure
    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN))
    .input(
      z.object({
        id: z.string().cuid(),
        newPassword: z.string().min(8).max(128),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
        async () => {
          const user = await prisma.user.findFirst({
            where: { id: input.id, tenantId },
          });
          if (user === null) {
            throw new TRPCError({ code: 'NOT_FOUND', message: 'Resource not found.' });
          }

          const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(input.newPassword, 12);
          await prisma.user.update({
            where: { id: input.id },
            data: { hashedPassword },
          });
          return { success: true };
        },
      );
    }),
});

```

```typescript
// Audit log router — tenant-scoped immutable audit trail (read-only)

import { z } from 'zod';
import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc.js';
import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac.js';
import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';

export const auditLogRouter = createTRPCRouter({
  list: tenantProcedure
    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN))
    .input(
      z.object({
        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
        entityType: z.string().optional(),
        entityId: z.string().optional(),
        actorUserId: z.string().cuid().optional(),
        startDate: z.string().datetime().optional(),
        endDate: z.string().datetime().optional(),
      }).strict(),
    )
    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
      const userId = ctx.userId!;
      return withTenantContext(
        { tenantId, userId },
        async () => {
          const where = {
            tenantId,
            ...(input.entityType !== undefined ? { entityType: input.entityType } : {}),
            ...(input.entityId !== undefined ? { entityId: input.entityId } : {}),
            ...(input.actorUserId !== undefined ? { actorUserId: input.actorUserId } : {}),
            ...(input.startDate !== undefined || input.endDate !== undefined
              ? {
                  createdAt: {
                    ...(input.startDate !== undefined ? { gte: new Date(input.startDate) } : {}),
                    ...(input.endDate !== undefined ? { lte: new Date(input.endDate) } : {}),
                  },
                }
              : {}),
          };
          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
            prisma.auditLog.findMany({
              where,
              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
              take: input.limit,
              orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
              include: {
                actorUser: { select: { name: true, email: true } },
              },
            }),
            prisma.auditLog.count({ where }),
          ]);
          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
        },
      );
    }),
});
```

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-03 10:20:18Z)**_

Zero router errors remaining. Here is a summary of all changes made across the 10 router files:

**Changes applied:**

1. **All 9 tenant-scoped routers** (audit-log, product, purchase-order, report, stock-adjustment, stock-in, stock-out, supplier, user): Added `const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;` and `const userId = ctx.userId!;` at the top of every resolver callback, then replaced all `ctx.tenantId` with `tenantId` and all `ctx.userId` with `userId`. This is safe because `enforceTenant` and `protectedProcedure` middlewares guarantee these are non-null at runtime.

2. **platform.router.ts** (Fix E): Added non-null assertion `ctx.userId!` on line 87 where `actorUserId` expects `string`.

3. **user.router.ts** (Fix C): Changed Zod enum values from uppercase (`'ADMIN'`, `'WAREHOUSE_STAFF'`, `'PURCHASING_STAFF'`) to lowercase (`'admin'`, `'warehouse_staff'`, `'purchasing_staff'`) in both the `create` and `update` input schemas, matching the Prisma `UserRole` enum values.

4. **user.router.ts and supplier.router.ts** (Fix D): Replaced direct spread of Zod-parsed `data` into Prisma `update()` with explicit field-by-field construction of `updateData` object that filters out `undefined` values, cast as `Prisma.UserUncheckedUpdateInput` / `Prisma.SupplierUncheckedUpdateInput`. Added `import type { Prisma } from '@inventorize/db'`.

5. **purchase-order.router.ts**: Changed the `status` filter in the `list` input from `z.string()` to `z.enum(['draft', 'ordered', 'partially_received', 'received', 'cancelled'])` to match the Prisma `POStatus` enum.

The 5 remaining typecheck errors (TS2742 in `src/lib/trpc.ts`, `src/middleware.ts`, `src/server/auth/index.ts`) are pre-existing and unrelated to the router fixes.

```text
1	// Next.js middleware — tenant resolution from URL path, auth guard, session-URL cross-check
2	
3	import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';
4	import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server';
5	import { auth } from '@/server/auth/index.js';
6	
7	// Paths that don't require authentication
8	const PUBLIC_PATHS = ['/login', '/api/health', '/api/trpc'];
9	
10	export default auth((req: NextRequest & { auth: unknown }) => {
11	  const { pathname } = req.nextUrl;
12	
13	  // Allow public paths
14	  if (PUBLIC_PATHS.some((p) => pathname.startsWith(p))) {
15	    return NextResponse.next();
16	  }
17	
18	  // Allow static assets and Next.js internals
19	  if (pathname.startsWith('/_next') || pathname.startsWith('/favicon')) {
20	    return NextResponse.next();
21	  }
22	
23	  const session = req.auth as {
24	    user?: { id: string; tenantId: string | null; tenantSlug: string | null; role: string };
25	  } | null;
26	
27	  // Unauthenticated → redirect to login
28	  if (session?.user === undefined) {
29	    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', req.url);
30	    loginUrl.searchParams.set('callbackUrl', pathname);
31	    return NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);
32	  }
33	
34	  // Super admin platform routes
35	  if (pathname.startsWith('/platform')) {
36	    if (session.user.role !== 'SUPER_ADMIN') {
37	      return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/login', req.url));
38	    }
39	    return NextResponse.next();
40	  }
41	
42	  // Tenant-scoped routes: /[tenantSlug]/...
43	  const slugMatch = pathname.match(/^\/([^/]+)/);
44	  if (slugMatch !== null) {
45	    const urlSlug = slugMatch[1];
46	
47	    // Cross-check: session tenantSlug must match URL slug
48	    // Prevents tenant-switching attack (user types /other-tenant/... in URL bar)
49	    if (session.user.tenantSlug !== urlSlug) {
50	      // Redirect to user's actual tenant
51	      if (session.user.tenantSlug !== null) {
52	        return NextResponse.redirect(new URL(`/${session.user.tenantSlug}/dashboard`, req.url));
53	      }
54	      return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/login', req.url));
55	    }
56	  }
57	
58	  return NextResponse.next();
59	});
60	
61	export const config = {
62	  matcher: ['/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico).*)'],
63	};
64
```

```text
1	// Report router — tenant-scoped reporting queries
2	
3	import { z } from 'zod';
4	import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc.js';
5	import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
6	import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';
7	
8	export const reportRouter = createTRPCRouter({
9	  lowStock: tenantProcedure
10	    .input(
11	      z.object({
12	        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
13	        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
14	      }).strict(),
15	    )
16	    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
17	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
18	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
19	      return withTenantContext(
20	        { tenantId, userId },
21	        async () => {
22	          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
23	            prisma.$queryRaw`
24	              SELECT id, "product_code" AS "productCode", name, "current_quantity" AS "currentQuantity",
25	                     "low_stock_threshold" AS "lowStockThreshold", unit, category
26	              FROM "Product"
27	              WHERE "tenant_id" = ${tenantId}
28	                AND "is_active" = true
29	                AND "current_quantity" <= "low_stock_threshold"
30	              ORDER BY ("current_quantity"::float / NULLIF("low_stock_threshold", 0)) ASC
31	              LIMIT ${input.limit} OFFSET ${(input.page - 1) * input.limit}
32	            ` as Promise<unknown[]>,
33	            prisma.product.count({
34	              where: {
35	                tenantId,
36	                isActive: true,
37	                currentQuantity: { lte: prisma.product.fields.lowStockThreshold as unknown as number },
38	              },
39	            }),
40	          ]);
41	
42	          // Fallback: use Prisma client for low stock count
43	          const lowStockCount = await prisma.product.count({
44	            where: {
45	              tenantId,
46	              isActive: true,
47	            },
48	          });
49	
50	          return { items, total: (items as unknown[]).length, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(lowStockCount / input.limit) };
51	        },
52	      );
53	    }),
54	
55	  stockMovements: tenantProcedure
56	    .input(
57	      z.object({
58	        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
59	        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
60	        productId: z.string().cuid().optional(),
61	        movementType: z.enum(['stock_in', 'stock_out', 'adjustment']).optional(),
62	        startDate: z.string().datetime().optional(),
63	        endDate: z.string().datetime().optional(),
64	      }).strict(),
65	    )
66	    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
67	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
68	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
69	      return withTenantContext(
70	        { tenantId, userId },
71	        async () => {
72	          const where = {
73	            tenantId,
74	            ...(input.productId !== undefined ? { productId: input.productId } : {}),
75	            ...(input.movementType !== undefined ? { movementType: input.movementType } : {}),
76	            ...(input.startDate !== undefined || input.endDate !== undefined
77	              ? {
78	                  performedAt: {
79	                    ...(input.startDate !== undefined ? { gte: new Date(input.startDate) } : {}),
80	                    ...(input.endDate !== undefined ? { lte: new Date(input.endDate) } : {}),
81	                  },
82	                }
83	              : {}),
84	          };
85	          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
86	            prisma.stockMovementLog.findMany({
87	              where,
88	              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
89	              take: input.limit,
90	              orderBy: { performedAt: 'desc' },
91	              include: {
92	                product: { select: { name: true, productCode: true } },
93	                performedByUser: { select: { name: true } },
94	              },
95	            }),
96	            prisma.stockMovementLog.count({ where }),
97	          ]);
98	          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
99	        },
100	      );
101	    }),
102	
103	  inventorySummary: tenantProcedure
104	    .query(async ({ ctx }) => {
105	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
106	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
107	      return withTenantContext(
108	        { tenantId, userId },
109	        async () => {
110	          const [totalProducts, activeProducts, lowStockProducts, totalValue] = await Promise.all([
111	            prisma.product.count({ where: { tenantId } }),
112	            prisma.product.count({ where: { tenantId, isActive: true } }),
113	            // Count products where current quantity is at or below threshold
114	            prisma.product.count({
115	              where: {
116	                tenantId,
117	                isActive: true,
118	              },
119	            }),
120	            // Sum of currentQuantity * sellingPrice for all active products
121	            prisma.product.findMany({
122	              where: { tenantId, isActive: true },
123	              select: { currentQuantity: true, sellingPrice: true },
124	            }),
125	          ]);
126	
127	          const inventoryValue = totalValue.reduce(
128	            (sum, p) => sum + p.currentQuantity * p.sellingPrice.toNumber(),
129	            0,
130	          );
131	
132	          return {
133	            totalProducts,
134	            activeProducts,
135	            lowStockProducts,
136	            inventoryValue,
137	          };
138	        },
139	      );
140	    }),
141	});
```

```text
20	    )
21	    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
22	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
23	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
24	      return withTenantContext(
25	        { tenantId, userId },
26	        async () => {
27	          const where = {
28	            tenantId,
29	            ...(input.search !== undefined
30	              ? {
31	                  OR: [
32	                    { name: { contains: input.search, mode: 'insensitive' as const } },
33	                    { productCode: { contains: input.search, mode: 'insensitive' as const } },
34	                    { barcodeValue: { contains: input.search, mode: 'insensitive' as const } },
35	                  ],
36	                }
37	              : {}),
38	            ...(input.category !== undefined ? { category: input.category } : {}),
39	            ...(input.isActive !== undefined ? { isActive: input.isActive } : {}),
40	          };
41	
42	          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
43	            prisma.product.findMany({
44	              where,
45	              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
46	              take: input.limit,
47	              orderBy: { name: 'asc' },
48	              select: {
49	                id: true,
50	                productCode: true,
51	                barcodeValue: true,
52	                name: true,
53	                category: true,
54	                unit: true,
55	                currentQuantity: true,
56	                lowStockThreshold: true,
57	                serialTrackingEnabled: true,
58	                isActive: true,
59	                // Pricing visible based on role — warehouse_staff excluded
60	                ...(ctx.roles.includes(UserRole.WAREHOUSE_STAFF)
61	                  ? { sellingPrice: true }
62	                  : {
63	                      supplierCost: true,
64	                      markupPercent: true,
65	                      sellingPrice: true,
66	                    }),
67	              },
68	            }),
69	            prisma.product.count({ where }),
70	          ]);
71	
72	          return {
73	            items,
74	            total,
75	            page: input.page,
76	            limit: input.limit,
77	            totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit),
78	          };
79	        },
80	      );
81	    }),
82	
83	  byId: tenantProcedure
84	    .input(z.object({ id: z.string().cuid() }).strict())
85	    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
86	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
87	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
88	      return withTenantContext(
89	        { tenantId, userId },
90	        async () => {
91	          const product = await prisma.product.findFirst({
92	            where: { id: input.id, tenantId },
93	          });
94	          if (product === null) {
95	            return null;
96	          }
97	          return product;
98	        },
99	      );
100	    }),
101	
102	  create: tenantProcedure
103	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN))
104	    .input(
105	      z.object({
106	        productCode: z.string().min(1).max(50),
107	        barcodeValue: z.string().min(1).max(100),
108	        name: z.string().min(1).max(200),
109	        category: z.string().min(1).max(100),
110	        unit: z.string().min(1).max(50),
111	        supplierCost: z.number().min(0),
112	        markupPercent: z.number().min(0),
113	        lowStockThreshold: z.number().int().min(0),
114	        serialTrackingEnabled: z.boolean(),
115	      }).strict(),
116	    )
117	    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
118	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
119	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
120	      return withTenantContext(
121	        { tenantId, userId },
122	        async () => {
123	          const sellingPrice = input.supplierCost + (input.supplierCost * input.markupPercent / 100);
124	
125	          return prisma.product.create({
126	            data: {
127	              ...input,
128	              tenantId,
129	              sellingPrice,
130	              currentQuantity: 0,
131	              isActive: true,
132	            },
133	          });
134	        },
135	      );
136	    }),
137	
138	  update: tenantProcedure
139	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN))
140	    .input(
141	      z.object({
142	        id: z.string().cuid(),
143	        productCode: z.string().min(1).max(50).optional(),
144	        barcodeValue: z.string().min(1).max(100).optional(),
145	        name: z.string().min(1).max(200).optional(),
146	        category: z.string().min(1).max(100).optional(),
147	        unit: z.string().min(1).max(50).optional(),
148	        supplierCost: z.number().min(0).optional(),
149	        markupPercent: z.number().min(0).optional(),
150	        lowStockThreshold: z.number().int().min(0).optional(),
151	        serialTrackingEnabled: z.boolean().optional(),
152	        isActive: z.boolean().optional(),
153	      }).strict(),
154	    )
155	    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
156	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
157	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
158	      return withTenantContext(
159	        { tenantId, userId },
160	        async () => {
161	          const { id, ...data } = input;
162	
163	          // Recalculate sellingPrice if pricing fields changed
164	          const updateData: Record<string, unknown> = { ...data };
165	          if (data.supplierCost !== undefined || data.markupPercent !== undefined) {
166	            const existing = await prisma.product.findFirst({
167	              where: { id, tenantId },
168	            });
169	            if (existing === null) {
170	              throw new Error('Resource not found.');
171	            }
172	            const cost = data.supplierCost ?? existing.supplierCost.toNumber();
173	            const markup = data.markupPercent ?? existing.markupPercent.toNumber();
174	            updateData['sellingPrice'] = cost + (cost * markup / 100);
175	          }
176	
177	          return prisma.product.update({
178	            where: { id },
179	            data: updateData,
180	          });
181	        },
182	      );
183	    }),
184	});
```

```text
1	// Stock in router — tenant-scoped receiving with atomic quantity updates
2	
3	import { z } from 'zod';
4	import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc.js';
5	import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac.js';
6	import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
7	import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
8	import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';
9	
10	export const stockInRouter = createTRPCRouter({
11	  list: tenantProcedure
12	    .input(
13	      z.object({
14	        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
15	        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
16	      }).strict(),
17	    )
18	    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
19	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
20	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
21	      return withTenantContext(
22	        { tenantId, userId },
23	        async () => {
24	          const where = { tenantId };
25	          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
26	            prisma.stockIn.findMany({
27	              where,
28	              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
29	              take: input.limit,
30	              orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
31	              include: { items: { include: { product: { select: { name: true } } } } },
32	            }),
33	            prisma.stockIn.count({ where }),
34	          ]);
35	          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
36	        },
37	      );
38	    }),
39	
40	  create: tenantProcedure
41	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.WAREHOUSE_STAFF, UserRole.PURCHASING_STAFF))
42	    .input(
43	      z.object({
44	        purchaseOrderId: z.string().cuid().nullable().default(null),
45	        receivedDate: z.string().datetime(),
46	        notes: z.string().max(2000).nullable().default(null),
47	        items: z.array(
48	          z.object({
49	            productId: z.string().cuid(),
50	            quantity: z.number().int().min(1),
51	            supplierCostSnapshot: z.number().min(0),
52	          }).strict(),
53	        ).min(1),
54	      }).strict(),
55	    )
56	    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
57	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
58	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
59	      return withTenantContext(
60	        { tenantId, userId },
61	        async () => {
62	          // Atomic transaction — stock in + quantity update + movement log
63	          return prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
64	            const stockIn = await tx.stockIn.create({
65	              data: {
66	                tenantId,
67	                referenceNumber: `SI-${Date.now()}`,
68	                purchaseOrderId: input.purchaseOrderId,
69	                receivedDate: new Date(input.receivedDate),
70	                receivedByUserId: userId,
71	                notes: input.notes,
72	                items: { create: input.items.map((item) => ({ ...item, tenantId })) },
73	              },
74	            });
75	
76	            // Fetch items separately — $extends client loses include types in transactions
77	            const stockInItems = await tx.stockInItem.findMany({
78	              where: { stockInId: stockIn.id },
79	            });
80	
81	            // Update product quantities and create movement logs
82	            for (const item of stockInItems) {
83	              const product = await tx.product.findFirstOrThrow({
84	                where: { id: item.productId, tenantId },
85	              });
86	
87	              await tx.product.update({
88	                where: { id: item.productId },
89	                data: { currentQuantity: { increment: item.quantity } },
90	              });
91	
92	              await tx.stockMovementLog.create({
93	                data: {
94	                  tenantId,
95	                  productId: item.productId,
96	                  movementType: 'stock_in',
97	                  referenceType: 'StockIn',
98	                  referenceId: stockIn.id,
99	                  quantityBefore: product.currentQuantity,
100	                  quantityDelta: item.quantity,
101	                  quantityAfter: product.currentQuantity + item.quantity,
102	                  performedByUserId: userId,
103	                  performedAt: new Date(),
104	                },
105	              });
106	            }
107	
108	            return stockIn;
109	          });
110	        },
111	      );
112	    }),
113	});
114
```

```text
1	// Stock out router — tenant-scoped releasing with atomic quantity updates
2	
3	import { z } from 'zod';
4	import { TRPCError } from '@trpc/server';
5	import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc.js';
6	import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac.js';
7	import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
8	import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
9	import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';
10	
11	export const stockOutRouter = createTRPCRouter({
12	  list: tenantProcedure
13	    .input(
14	      z.object({
15	        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
16	        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
17	      }).strict(),
18	    )
19	    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
20	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
21	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
22	      return withTenantContext(
23	        { tenantId, userId },
24	        async () => {
25	          const where = { tenantId };
26	          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
27	            prisma.stockOut.findMany({
28	              where,
29	              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
30	              take: input.limit,
31	              orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
32	              include: { items: { include: { product: { select: { name: true } } } } },
33	            }),
34	            prisma.stockOut.count({ where }),
35	          ]);
36	          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
37	        },
38	      );
39	    }),
40	
41	  create: tenantProcedure
42	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.WAREHOUSE_STAFF))
43	    .input(
44	      z.object({
45	        releasedDate: z.string().datetime(),
46	        requestedByName: z.string().min(1).max(200),
47	        usedFor: z.string().min(1).max(500),
48	        notes: z.string().max(2000).nullable().default(null),
49	        items: z.array(
50	          z.object({
51	            productId: z.string().cuid(),
52	            quantity: z.number().int().min(1),
53	            sellingPriceSnapshot: z.number().min(0),
54	          }).strict(),
55	        ).min(1),
56	      }).strict(),
57	    )
58	    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
59	      const tenantId = ctx.tenantId!;
60	      const userId = ctx.userId!;
61	      return withTenantContext(
62	        { tenantId, userId },
63	        async () => {
64	          return prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
65	            // Generate slip number (SO-00001 format, per-tenant sequential)
66	            const lastOut = await tx.stockOut.findFirst({
67	              where: { tenantId },
68	              orderBy: { printableSlipNumber: 'desc' },
69	              select: { printableSlipNumber: true },
70	            });
71	            const lastNum = lastOut !== null
72	              ? parseInt(lastOut.printableSlipNumber.replace('SO-', ''), 10)
73	              : 0;
74	            const slipNumber = `SO-${String(lastNum + 1).padStart(5, '0')}`;
75	
76	            // Validate sufficient stock for all items
77	            for (const item of input.items) {
78	              const product = await tx.product.findFirstOrThrow({
79	                where: { id: item.productId, tenantId },
80	              });
81	              if (product.currentQuantity < item.quantity) {
82	                throw new TRPCError({
83	                  code: 'BAD_REQUEST',
84	                  message: `Insufficient stock for ${product.name}. Available: ${product.currentQuantity}`,
85	                });
86	              }
87	            }
88	
89	            const stockOut = await tx.stockOut.create({
90	              data: {
91	                tenantId,
92	                referenceNumber: `SO-REF-${Date.now()}`,
93	                releasedDate: new Date(input.releasedDate),
94	                releasedByUserId: userId,
95	                requestedByName: input.requestedByName,
96	                usedFor: input.usedFor,
97	                notes: input.notes,
98	                printableSlipNumber: slipNumber,
99	                items: { create: input.items.map((item) => ({ ...item, tenantId })) },
100	              },
101	            });
102	
103	            // Fetch items separately — $extends client loses include types in transactions
104	            const stockOutItems = await tx.stockOutItem.findMany({
105	              where: { stockOutId: stockOut.id },
106	            });
107	
108	            // Decrement quantities and create movement logs
109	            for (const item of stockOutItems) {
110	              const product = await tx.product.findFirstOrThrow({
111	                where: { id: item.productId, tenantId },
112	              });
113	
114	              await tx.product.update({
115	                where: { id: item.productId },
116	                data: { currentQuantity: { decrement: item.quantity } },
117	              });
118	
119	              await tx.stockMovementLog.create({
120	                data: {
121	                  tenantId,
122	                  productId: item.productId,
123	                  movementType: 'stock_out',
124	                  referenceType: 'StockOut',
125	                  referenceId: stockOut.id,
126	                  quantityBefore: product.currentQuantity,
127	                  quantityDelta: -item.quantity,
128	                  quantityAfter: product.currentQuantity - item.quantity,
129	                  performedByUserId: userId,
130	                  requestedByName: input.requestedByName,
131	                  usedFor: input.usedFor,
132	                  performedAt: new Date(),
133	                },
134	              });
135	            }
136	
137	            return stockOut;
138	          });
139	        },
140	      );
141	    }),
142	});
143
```

```text
1	// Login page — credentials-based authentication
2	
3	'use client';
4	
5	import { useState } from 'react';
6	import { signIn } from 'next-auth/react';
7	import { useRouter, useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation';
8	
9	export default function LoginPage() {
10	  const router = useRouter();
11	  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
12	  const callbackUrl = searchParams?.get('callbackUrl') ?? null;
13	  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
14	  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
15	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
16	  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
17	
18	  async function handleSubmit(e: React.FormEvent) {
19	    e.preventDefault();
20	    setIsLoading(true);
21	    setError(null);
22	
23	    const result = await signIn('credentials', {
24	      email,
25	      password,
26	      redirect: false,
27	    });
28	
29	    setIsLoading(false);
30	
31	    if (result?.error !== undefined && result.error !== null) {
32	      setError('Invalid credentials.');
33	      return;
34	    }
35	
36	    // Redirect to callback URL or dashboard
37	    router.push(callbackUrl ?? '/');
38	    router.refresh();
39	  }
40	
41	  return (
42	    <div className="flex min-h-screen items-center justify-center bg-background">
43	      <div className="w-full max-w-sm space-y-6 rounded-lg border border-border p-8 shadow-sm">
44	        <div className="space-y-2 text-center">
45	          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">Inventorize</h1>
46	          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Sign in to your account</p>
47	        </div>
48	
49	        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
50	          {error !== null && (
51	            <div className="rounded-md bg-destructive/10 p-3 text-sm text-destructive">
52	              {error}
53	            </div>
54	          )}
55	
56	          <div className="space-y-2">
57	            <label htmlFor="email" className="text-sm font-medium">
58	              Email
59	            </label>
60	            <input
61	              id="email"
62	              type="email"
63	              value={email}
64	              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
65	              required
66	              className="flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2"
67	              placeholder="you@example.com"
68	            />
69	          </div>
70	
71	          <div className="space-y-2">
72	            <label htmlFor="password" className="text-sm font-medium">
73	              Password
74	            </label>
75	            <input
76	              id="password"
77	              type="password"
78	              value={password}
79	              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
80	              required
81	              className="flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2"
82	              placeholder="Enter your password"
83	            />
84	          </div>
85	
86	          <button
87	            type="submit"
88	            disabled={isLoading}
89	            className="inline-flex h-10 w-full items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-primary-foreground ring-offset-background transition-colors hover:bg-primary/90 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50"
90	          >
91	            {isLoading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign in'}
92	          </button>
93	        </form>
94	      </div>
95	    </div>
96	  );
97	}
```

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-03 10:24:35Z)**_

The config uses `recommended-type-checked` which has `no-unused-vars` with default settings. The default does not ignore underscore-prefixed destructured variables. I need to actually remove the destructured `setPage`. The cleanest fix: since these components only ever read `page` (hardcoded to 1, never set), I can just use a const instead of useState. But that would change behavior -- the `page` is passed to tRPC queries, and `setPage` will be needed when pagination is implemented.

Better approach: just ignore the second element of the tuple by not destructuring it.
